articles.title: Is AI Making You Dumber? It Depends on When You Use It
articles.summary: A new study reveals that using AI later in problem-solving boosts critical thinking, but early use helps under time pressure. The trade-off between speed and deep thinking matters.

articles.title: Blocking One Protein Restores Memory in Alzheimer's Mice
articles.summary: Scientists blocked the protein PTP1B in mice with Alzheimer's, improving their learning and memory. This discovery could lead to new treatments that target multiple aspects of the disease.

articles.title: Your Everyday Movements Are Being Turned Into Robot Training Data
articles.summary: Robotics companies are paying people to film themselves doing simple tasks to train humanoid robots. This data collection raises questions about privacy and the future of AI.
